title: YOUTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: NARA NW CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES GRESHAM YOUTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific residential treatment services. 620 NE 2nd Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Ages 12-17. Provides culturally appropriate services for the Native American community. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 953-6598 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 953-6598 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, VA, Blue Cross, Indian Health Services, Tribal Funds, and private pay DOCUMENTS: Must have a current alcohol and drug assessment, physical exam, and tuberculosis test prior to being reviewed and approved by the admissions committee AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD AND FAMILY SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - NARA NW YOUTH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
